name: qualia-v4-refresh-enabled
description: Once any node has a pointer, the Refresh button should switch to its enabled appearance.

checkpoints.name: refresh-now-enabled
checkpoints.description: Top toolbar. The Refresh button should now look ENABLED — same visual weight as Import/Export beside it. Pass only if Refresh appears active/clickable (not muted/disabled). Fail if it still looks dim or has the disabled cursor.
